description: Validate security measures after each penetration test. Document any challenges with validation and provide a remediation plan with timeline.
guidance: Conduct a validation re-test for all critical and high findings from the initial pentest. Document pass/fail status in a follow-up report.
implementationGuide: Deploy and enforce validate security measures after penetration testing across all enterprise assets. Document the process, assign an owner, and review quarterly.
exampleEvidence: Written Validate Security Measures After Penetration Testing policy signed by the security lead, dated within the last 12 months
Tool configuration or scan report showing validate security measures after penetration testing is active across all in-scope assets
Quarterly review record confirming compliance with this safeguard

title: Perform Periodic Internal Penetration Tests
description: Perform periodic internal penetration tests no less than annually. Scope should include environment reconnaissance and network layer testing.
guidance: Conduct annual internal network penetration tests from an assumed-breach position. Test lateral movement paths and directory attack vectors.
implementationGuide: Deploy and enforce perform periodic internal penetration tests across all enterprise assets. Document the process, assign an owner, and review quarterly.
exampleEvidence: Written Perform Periodic Internal Penetration Tests policy signed by the security lead, dated within the last 12 months
Tool configuration or scan report showing perform periodic internal penetration tests is active across all in-scope assets
Quarterly review record confirming compliance with this safeguard
